quotes.text: its very good app clean and simple but it will be more beneficial if they add grouping system in watchlists like kite have launched recently
Excellent application. unfortunately I closed my trading account. Now I want to reopen my trading account. But there are no option to reopen
The app is crashing today sir . Despite logging through mobile verification, it is automatically getting logged out even after catching otp

action_ideas: Implement a watchlist grouping system to enhance organization and user experience.
Develop a clear process and feature for users to easily reopen closed trading accounts.
Prioritize fixing app crashing and automatic logout issues to improve stability and login reliability.
